creator: samy.mahmoudi@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

Did you try sending a mail asking commit under maintainer timeout? Here is the pattern I use in such cases:

Address: ports@freebsd.org

Subject:
[patch] [maintainer timeout, ~20 months] bug 231730 - sysutils/consolekit2: add polkit build option

Body:
Dear committer,

Could you please commit the changes associated with the patch file of https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=231730 ?

Best regards,
